label: 1451a Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 103–66, title XIII, § 13811(b)(1)107 Stat. 670Aug. 10, 1993
notes: Section, , , provided that certain extra compensation of customs officers and employees assigned to performance of inspectional services in connection with traffic over highways, toll bridges, etc. on Sundays or holidays prior to , was to be payable by the U.S. without reimbursement by the applicant for such services and that any reimbursement which had accrued and been collected since , was to be refunded.act June 3, 1944, ch. 233, § 258 Stat. 270June 3, 1944Jan. 6, 1941

Effective Date of RepealRepeal applicable to customs inspectional services provided on or after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1993 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 1994section 13811(c) of Pub. L. 103–66section 267 of this title
